articles.title: World Cup: Iran's national team has arrived in Mexico
articles.summary: (ANSA) - ROME, JUNE 07 - The Iranian national team has landed in Mexico, in Tijuana, where they will be based for the World Cup starting in a few days.

articles.title: Serie C play-off, Ascoli-Union Brescia 3-0: bianconeri promoted to Serie B after two years
articles.summary: After the 1-1 draw in the first leg, under a universal downpour which then led to the suspension and postponement of the match, this evening Ascoli beat Union Brescia 3-0 in the return leg and achieved promotion to Serie B.

articles.title: Brazil, Wesley out for the World Cup: Ederson called up in his place
articles.summary: Bad news for the Celecao coached by Carlo Ancelotti who, during the last friendly match played against Egypt, saw Roma winger Wesley leave the field due to injury and leave the pitch in tears after just 15 minutes.

articles.title: Shevchenko sends message to Eriksen: “I wish a good recovery, life is the most precious thing”
articles.summary: Minutes of tension experienced after 65 minutes of play in the friendly match between Denmark and Ukraine.

articles.title: Milan protest: the pot is boiling hotter and hotter. Did Cardinale underestimate his revolution? Decisions to be made quickly
articles.summary: We are at the beginning of the third week of the cardinal revolution and the time has come to make choices.

articles.title: Bayern slams the door in Florentino Perez's face: "150 million for Olise? Save themselves the trouble"
articles.summary: Just today there was the vote for the presidential elections of Real Madrid. On one side the incumbent president Florentino Perez and on the other the challenger Juan Roman Riquelme.

articles.title: Moretto: “Lazio like Gimenez a lot but there have been no contacts yet”
articles.summary: On Fabrizio Romano's YouTube channel, Matteo Moretto commented on the rumors linking Santiago Gimenez to Lazio. These are his words.

articles.title: Repice on Adani: "Way of presenting ideas? It can be annoying but everyone has their own"
articles.summary: During the last episode of the podcast Do you know about football, Francesco Repice talked about Lele Adani, his ideas and how he exposes them to the public. These are his words.

articles.title: Eriksen, the ghosts of Euro2020 return: he leaves the field after an illness during Denmark-Ukraine
articles.summary: There were moments of terror, even greater given what happened during Euro 2020 in Denmark-Finland, those experienced during the Danish national team's friendly match against Ukraine.

articles.title: Rabiot humble: "At the World Cup I will be more defensive, there is a lot of talent up front, we need to plug the holes"
articles.summary: During the France-Northern Ireland pre-match press conference, AC Milan midfielder Adrien Rabiot explained what his role and task will be within the team during the World Cup. These are his words.

articles.title: National team, Greece-Italy 0-1: another 90 minutes for Bartesaghi
articles.summary: The match between Greece and Italy ends 1-0 in the national teams' second summer friendly.

articles.title: National teams, Croatia beats Slovenia: Modric scores the goal to make it 1-0
articles.summary: This evening, in addition to Davide Bartesaghi with Italy, Croatian midfielder Luka Modric also took to the field with his national team in the friendly match played in Croatia at the Herjavec stadium against Slovenia.

articles.title: Ordine underlines: "Manager with more influence? Marotta. Who proposes Malagò as president? Marotta... He will have greater pressure..."
articles.summary: Speaking on QSVS, the well-known journalist Franco Ordine spoke about Inter president Beppe Marotta and his political influence. These are his words.

articles.title: For the U21 test with Albania, Nunziata: "We're closing the season well"
articles.summary: (ANSA) - ROME, JUNE 07 - Last test to "close the season well".

articles.title: Milan, the certainty is called Strahinja Pavlović: the Serbian's numbers in the Rossoneri
articles.summary: Very calmly, perhaps too calmly, Milan is trying to organize the next 2026/2027 season. Indeed, this is a June that started as usual.

articles.title: Repice against the grain: “I love defending myself with barricades for 90 minutes and winning on the counterattack”
articles.summary: In the last episode of the podcast You know about football, Francesco Repice spoke about the well-known diatribe between those who define themselves as "gamers" and those who instead are "resultists". These are his words.

articles.title: Gimenez and Milan, a story that never blossomed: Bebote is now a case
articles.summary: Santiago Gimenez and Milan. It seems like the beginning of a love story that started well and (so far) reached a climax, a limit so important that it cannot be overcome.

articles.title: MN - Waseige suggests Lukaku to Milan: "Having a person like him in the locker room is lucky"
articles.summary: Among the talents that Milan are monitoring for the future there is also Nathan De Cat, a midfielder born in 2008 for Anderlecht and considered one of the most interesting prospects in Belgian football.

articles.title: U17 European Final: Belgium beaten on penalties, Italy is European champion!
articles.summary: After a beautiful but very close match, in the 85th minute the red devils took the lead thanks to Cobiella's goal, a goal which from what was seen on the pitch was ultimately deserved.
